xwikidoc.name: ExtensionAuthorsDisplayer
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content: {{velocity}} #if ($xcontext.action == 'edit') #set($isEditMode = true) #else #set($isViewMode = true) #end #set($name = "authors") #set($pageList = $doc.getValue($name)) #if ($isEditMode) {{html clean="false"}} ## Force local+global suggestions so that main wiki users are suggested too, like the previous ## custom picker did (which always queried the main wiki when on a subwiki). This overrides the ## #userPicker default of using the wiki's configured user scope ($services.wiki.user.userScope). #set ($parameters = { 'id': "${prefix}${name}", 'name': "${prefix}${name}", 'value': $pageList, 'data-userScope': 'LOCAL_AND_GLOBAL' }) #userPicker(true $parameters) {{/html}} #else #foreach($page in $pageList)#if($foreach.count > 1), #end#if($xwiki.exists($page))[[${xwiki.getUserName($page, false)}>>$page]]#else$services.rendering.escape($page, 'xwiki/2.1')#end#end #end {{/velocity}}
